name: Mike Braun
subject: For Our Moms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:

| | Peter, When I see amazing moms like my wonderful wife of 40 years, Maureen, it reminds me of the profound importance of ensuring prosperity for Hoosier families everywhere. Washington politics don’t support the hard work ethic of single moms, the values and dedication of stay at home moms, or the values and liberties of working moms. **It’s time to create a culture in Washington that values our mothers as much as we do.**

Let’s take a moment to thank Moms for their enduring love, unending dedication, and matchless generosity. And let’s join together today to ensure that Washington never tries to reduce or replace our the most valuable members of our community: mothers. From the Braun family to yours: Happy Mother’s Day. [**Contribute today to a vision of a more prosperous future for Indiana.**](http://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jyddihty-kujulhlke-j/) -Mike

name: The White House
subject: A milestone this morning in Jerusalem
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=4ded447a1b9eda29e76d3237054010bf763e2691ea8862ee0b12db2e0553c0e0260e8f5183ebfdf58c04d7fd79e47cf6e2be628f111af9d6) The White House • May 14, 2018
## Earlier this morning
The United States officially opened its embassy in Jerusalem, Israel—a move that fulfills one of President Donald J. Trump’s signature campaign promises. The Administration has also formally recognized Jerusalem as Israel’s capital. [Watch the President’s message.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=4ded447a1b9eda2964f4fdf7df634199cd9df56506dc3842aa34dd4aa8412e873f6e620e9fe1e129507ed37f5b97ebd9f9c969d7af1740da) |
---
|

## A milestone this morning in Jerusalem
**Around 9 a.m. ET, the U.S. opened its new embassy in Jerusalem, Israel.** “When I came into office, I promised to look at the world’s challenges with open eyes and very fresh thinking,” President Trump said when announcing the move in December. “We cannot solve our problems by making the same failed assumptions.”
**The move honors a bipartisan wish dating more than two decades.** Every President since Bill Clinton has expressed support for the idea of Jerusalem as Israel’s capital. Last year, the Senate unanimously reaffirmed a 1995 law calling for the U.S. Embassy in Tel Aviv to be relocated to the holy city.
**The Administration continues to work toward a lasting peace agreement** between the Israelis and Palestinians. Recognition of Jerusalem as Israel’s capital is a necessary condition for such a deal. The President also supports preserving the status quo at Jerusalem’s holy sites.
[ President Trump keeps his promise to open the U.S. Embassy in Jerusalem, Israel.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=4ded447a1b9eda29145303ee17810f3695661dc5ace361e1a02600e098b87bc4275f7c37a568d5becf916927e01086ae6dcc126aa70303a3)
**Watch** : [This morning’s dedication ceremony ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=4ded447a1b9eda291ab1edcb728b457fd95aa5e2ce63e238d98dd51f0f2860283f0d3dd15b98a6cf717d113a6ef2f52cce7e3f0d4f47ccd8)

---
|

## The game plan to lower drug prices
**Drug prices are being driven up unfairly** , taking a toll on the American people. Foreign freeloading and a system rigged to reward list price increases contribute to the United States having the highest per-capital pharmaceutical spending in the developed world. Other countries take advantage of socialized healthcare to command unfairly low prices from U.S. drug makers at a cost to Americans.
**President Trump’s blueprint aims to boost competition** , address free-riding by other countries, and reform Federal programs. For example, under the President’s watch, the Department of Health and Human Services will take steps to end the gaming of regulatory and patent processes, as well as accelerate the approval process for over-the-counter drugs.
[See President Trump’s blueprint to lower drug prices and address freeloading. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=4ded447a1b9eda29d3494a615227259a09e72decba547430f6157deba0106b04133e47108e24f33da33d0b98255f25f7a03a015371f341f5)
**Watch** : [Highlights from the President’s remarks at the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=4ded447a1b9eda294042fda8e4f0bac34bcc1a024f9ac7b260b8c09b5d1d645f2b8c7cf577fbaa48534cc5ef4f735974c27b0bdc39fe1f0a)

---
|

Official White House Photos by Joyce N. Boghosian
**President Donald J. Trump boards Air Force One at Joint Base Andrews** | May 10, 2018

name: Majority Whip Steve Scalise
subject: The Final Quarter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
As the Majority Whip, it is my job to ensure we have the votes to get the policies passed that the American people truly care about in our country.
Now, we are about to head into the final quarter of the 115th Congress, so we want to know the voters’ priorities. **[That’s where you come in.](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTM0LTc3NjA1Y2YzOTU4NDQ5M2Y4ZjE4MWRlMGMwNjljYWFk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3QubnJjYy5vcmcvYW1lcmljYS1wcmlvcml0aWVzLXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1QQUUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFByb3NwZWN0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MDUxNF9Qcmlvcml0aWVzU3VydmV5X1BBRV9HT1AzX0VQX1N0ZXZlU2NhbGlzZQ&K=azJmyDXLeS0lgxkVwWh-XQ)**
We are not finished making history. **We are looking at a fundamental change in how Washington, D.C. works.** We need your expertise as someone who is outside the D.C. beltway to help guide us.
**[As one of the most important people in the movement, your input in the House Priorities Survey is extremely valuable to Speaker Ryan and me.](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTM0LTc3NjA1Y2YzOTU4NDQ5M2Y4ZjE4MWRlMGMwNjljYWFk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3QubnJjYy5vcmcvYW1lcmljYS1wcmlvcml0aWVzLXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1QQUUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFByb3NwZWN0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MDUxNF9Qcmlvcml0aWVzU3VydmV5X1BBRV9HT1AzX0VQX1N0ZXZlU2NhbGlzZQ&K=n_Wd8zFpUlm_bK_MlhlBcw)**

I won’t lie, the rest of the year will be a difficult one. The liberal establishment will criticize everything we accomplish. We need opinions from our supporters to help guide our agenda.
Please use this button to access the survey now: [ **Take A Stand** ](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTM0LTc3NjA1Y2YzOTU4NDQ5M2Y4ZjE4MWRlMGMwNjljYWFk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3QubnJjYy5vcmcvYW1lcmljYS1wcmlvcml0aWVzLXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1QQUUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFByb3NwZWN0JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDE4MDUxNF9Qcmlvcml0aWVzU3VydmV5X1BBRV9HT1AzX0VQX1N0ZXZlU2NhbGlzZQ&K=xRelK920nfbyHPRPxvq3pA) Let’s keep making history together.

name: Jason Yates
subject: Today is monumental!
body:
| | Christians should celebrate what is happening
---
American and Israeli flags along the road, in preparation of the move of the US embassy to Jerusalem
| Peter, Today is monumental! In 1995 the United States Congress passed the Jerusalem Embassy Act, which mandated the United States Israel Embassy be moved from Tel Aviv to Israel’s capital of Jerusalem. Yet, for 23 years every United States president has signed a waiver to delay the move of the embassy. **However, because of continued pressure from Christians, including thousands from My Faith Votes, President Trump has made a different decision than past presidents. He has chosen to uphold the Jerusalem Embassy Act of 1995 and today the United States Embassy is officially opening in Jerusalem!** This move is extremely important and exciting to Christians because of what scripture teaches us. **Israel is a nation created not by man but by God.** The Lord gave the land of Israel to Abraham and his offspring in an everlasting covenant (Psalm 89:28-37). Genesis 12:2 God says to Abraham, “I will make you into a great nation, and I will bless you; I will make your name great, and you will be a blessing.” **Israel is the birthplace of our Christian faith.** Jesus Christ a Jew came first for His people, then for the Gentiles (Romans 1:16). The Jewish people gave birth to our sacred scriptures, the prophets, the disciples, and apostles. One only has to walk the streets of Israel to see scripture come to life in the Holy Land. **There is a blessing for those who stand with Israel. “** I will bless those who bless you, and whoever curses you I will curse; and all peoples on earth will be blessed through you” Genesis 12:3. There is a blessing in store for the nations who stand in Israel’s defense. Psalms 122:6 says “Pray for the peace of Jerusalem: ‘May those who love you be secure.’” Peter, pray today for peace in Jerusalem. Just last week Iranian forces in Syria launched rockets towards Israel and many believe the move of the U.S. Embassy could incite additional violence. Pray for Israel’s leaders, their military, and intelligence personnel as they work to combat these attacks. Israel is a beacon of freedom and prosperity in the midst of a difficult region of the world. They are a nation roughly the size of New Jersey, yet Israel draws the attention of the world because it is the birthplace of our faith. We thank God for this historic and exciting day to see the United States standing with Israel! **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180514com01&n=1)
---

name: Steve Schultz
subject: Here's what we know about Debbie
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | President Donald Trump likes bluster and bullying people. He tried to do it again to Debbie over Twitter last month. But he failed miserably -- even getting her name wrong. He called her "Wendy Wasserman Schultz". Donald Trump and his Republican friends in Congress know nothing about my wife. And they know even less about the challenges of the families in South Florida that she represents. The one thing they do know about Debbie is she is a thorn in their side. On every policy and position, from tax cuts for billionaires to denying health insurance to those with pre-existing conditions, Debbie will stand up and speak out...that is just who she is. And with Trump personally calling her out, we can take nothing for granted this November. Debbie needs us fighting beside her. [_**We also know she has a mid-quarter deadline coming up tomorrow. Can you help us reach our $10,000 goal by giving $5 or more?**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fca/622b7b5b/1abbdeec/307b866b/4014732595/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180427?refcode=dwse180427_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Here are some things about Debbie you need to know: **Debbie is relentless.** During her first campaign, she was up against five well-known and well-funded members of the Florida old boys club. She personally knocked on thousands of doors to win that campaign. It's the kind of tenacity she brings to her work in Congress every day. **Debbie is a survivor.** Debbie is a breast cancer survivor. She's also the mother of our wonderful children. She knows first-hand how scary it is to get a bad diagnosis, or have to take care of sick children, and how much you need your health insurance to come through for you just then. **Debbie is a fighter.** Republicans have tried to bully her before -- after all, she's one of the most outspoken opponents of their right-wing agenda. But Debbie has Gator skin. When it comes to the good of her constituents, she doesn't give up. She gets things done. Whether it's presidential tweets, Republican attacks, or well-funded opponents, Debbie is focused on her job. We need to focus on getting her the resources she needs to win reelection. [_**If you can, rush in a contribution before time runs out.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fca/622b7b5b/1abbdeec/307b866b/4014732595/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180427?refcode=dwse180427_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thanks! Steve Schultz

body:
"We are the richest country on Earth. There is no reason each and every citizen should not have health coverage." | |
---
**"We are the richest country on Earth. There is no reason each and every citizen should not have health coverage."** _\-- Rep. Tim Ryan_ [Sign on to support Medicare for All ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9558/5486deaa/28fee99f/dcc29da/3226433712/VEsH/ "https://sign.actiontaker.org/page/s/medicare-for-all-ja?source=Tim-Ryan&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/Medicare-For-All-Tim-Ryan-AB") Folks, Good news! Support for universal health care is SURGING. A recent Kaiser Family Foundation survey found that **59 percent** of Americans now support a "Medicare for All" plan. Working people are sick and tired of politicians attacking our health care system instead of fixing it. If Democrats win big in 2018, we can make bold strides toward making health care a RIGHT for all Americans. **Join Tim and Democrats across the country -- sign on in support of universal health care through Medicare for All!** [Sign on ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9558/5486deaa/28fee99f/dcc29da/3226433712/VEsE/ "https://sign.actiontaker.org/page/s/medicare-for-all-ja?source=Tim-Ryan&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/Medicare-For-All-Tim-Ryan-AB") A year ago, 217 House Republicans voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act and throw 23 million Americans off their health insurance. It's truly frightening to think about how close we were to the brink of disaster. Tim has been a co-sponsor the Medicare for All bill in the U.S. House since the 110th Congress. He's committed not only to protecting the laws we have -- but also making sure no American goes without access to the care they need. **Like we've always said: The 2018 election can't JUST be about being "anti-Trump." **Democrats must campaign on a bold vision that speaks to the economic aspirations of ALL working people, and universal health care is a key part of that. [Join the growing movement to make sure health care is a RIGHT, not a privilege. Sign on now to support Medicare for All >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9558/5486deaa/28fee99f/dcc29dd/3226433712/VEsF/ "http://sign.actiontaker.org/page/s/medicare-for-all-ja?source=Tim-Ryan&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/Medicare-For-All-Tim-Ryan-AB") Thanks for standing with us, \-- Team Ryan [Contribute ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9558/5486deaa/28fee99f/dcc29dc/3226433712/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_apr18?refcode=med4all_em20180514_OH_footer")

# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.

body:
Together, we won the Republican endorsement for United States Senate at convention. And we owe it all to the dedication and support of hundreds of....
Friend, this weekend marked a turning point in our campaign: now we must shift our eyes from the primary, and onto the general.

Together, we won the Republican endorsement for United States Senate at convention.

And we owe it all to the dedication and support of hundreds of grassroots supporters, like you.

So first, let me say, thank you.

Now, this victory is a cause for celebration, but times like these can create tension between other members of our party. And friend, that makes us ALL weaker.

Conservatives can’t expect to win in November if we can’t support each other now.

[**So today, I am calling for unity, and I am personally asking for you to join me with a gift of $25.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=afbc429818204483bd3515146ccddad9&_e=Q0EPqwUqiGWSdlOZ_XglRpd6pf2IUsEBiwBw_C6OjME4syzv8V-YmCBnjaXIx1pdq-gN6X7vgGsrYUi4L_qN2rOQl2MXsf_ynnLj2dR8KFHnbsr8yWXkZI5wyqAo61pbjWbMXU4B5lCtcFh3fBlrISVZrSuas9B55Igj6phkOslXyiekKA7olWixSJzzTC2Ul-2PCFYnwCbVUeSuBHcxajB994b9XX60QBWn_CuzfFP3v-blXfKtKpP_ZFnKjkdHuqq1lbWVkOSybG1ybtlQuu4fS-nto1x62J2sO4QBaby4CgppdeVMFG1sxa-0rge6CXRuBIKqV9RWoQsiSUClTuMUx5qRqdNRJYQOHbghOKSZfB_KFtvBFm75tQ99ZhxvQQDldwh3eR-JNj-WpoSBhYNk6vyghUhbxPSITXg3XOiXn99YoKEzvLir29oUQlbc)

We need to look straight ahead, towards the general election and focus on a November victory.

Believe me, dissension is what Tammy Baldwin and the liberal establishment will be doing – along with collecting millions from their mega donors.

If Republicans are fighting with each other, rather than focusing on defeating Baldwin, our resources will be split, our message will be distorted, and friend, we might not be able to make it out of that mess.

If we want conservative victories and if we want to put America First and change Washington, we have to come together and defeat obstructionists like Tammy Baldwin.

That means unifying now.
[SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE VICTORY](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=afbc429818204483bd3515146ccddad9&_e=Q0EPqwUqiGWSdlOZ_XglRpd6pf2IUsEBiwBw_C6OjMFxWk-FiyJwT0vH-2_oN--8RNTd085o-SBQj4SOJrUAAa4PpfQYC1g5-X8U-vD7mjNAJ6IQ86WdAO0yx5WZWVe2b28eWs2bRP1hz1vo_bnitSsrM-EDrEpPA06yF-slv0vX-uZBrf24JzwGJc1PxUhlTGNUhPdu7eVXCpsB043E0Jg4QfMWx6l-l1PlB6ICEhgAeHGE1xxlKVywETith5j_Xlm3x9loTYdnNUmOo3BmqMHKaJRkFvVYALOBlsEUsi64_OGYSbnFCvxpdSr59P187RWds1AWj417yYl425Qaw55Jyl4EOJEwWW1w8nKHIYuDBvoy0FYMAp9Vw21AEJj3YA0amg61MxQJC9_hBMIniUUeBl6g3WiaQ4BycUncFsA%3D)
---

The stakes are just too high to let anything come in the way of defeating Tammy Baldwin.

Thank you,

Leah

That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=afbc429818204483bd3515146ccddad9&_e=Q0EPqwUqiGWSdlOZ_XglRmdGygc8ibj-HNuQUQjj7ka4EhhyPFJsj0k5p5Z6iK7CZ74XrEfhWtxFWphwsm-kMPYDYCYyJ7HPVoyQc2m8BxBUF5Wky2Lt87yo6NNVPAVcC9AiUN7sHPvyQy8akKGXLykZkefOGZk0eN22m7wvh3fAedjFYMXRwUnwtUTMmog4S9UxvaAsQjp4OHIlUH54_n94JoNkBHP3VVbIXckljdembkC3GQsuLjObxZJsfQOnuyIKOrRY4r8nlzNqEcaNgWYfr8eVIm7QFakqfw5gntoeXUaXnN0SsJJk6EcM2BQ50kkaJHcZ6APtRv273X_KSbTLWHGp5OW9_hrMCTxjPENmSNSSSgy58Lr1v9qfdggJ) that you care about? subject: I'm going to get straight to the point

body:
I don't think it's a senator's job to just be a copy machine for the president, or anyone else. No, the job of a U.S. Senator from Indiana is to think through the issues and do what's right for Ho |

| | Peter,

I'm going to get straight to the point: **[I'm asking you to give our campaign a few bucks.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c214a/7377f838/3f51a841/51f96899/4237272857/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?refcode=20180514.1nd&amount=10")**

Now for why I'm asking: Less than a week ago, Republicans chose who's going to run against me. The guy they picked seems to think the goal of a U.S. Senator is to do nothing except exactly what President Trump wants -- and if Hoosiers think the president is wrong even once, too bad for them.

But I don't think it's a senator's job to just be a copy machine for the president, or anyone else. No, the job of a U.S. Senator from Indiana is to think through the issues and do what's right for Hoosiers, and no one else.

**But if we don't find new donors to support our campaign, Indiana could get stuck with a copy machine for a senator. Can you make a donation to keep that from happening?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c214a/7377f838/3f51a841/51f96894/4237272857/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?refcode=20180514.1nd")**
Look, I know I'm in a tough race. President Trump and Vice President Pence have said **they 'll campaign against me like we wouldn't believe because I voted against Mitch McConnell's disastrous tax bill -- and they've already started.** That's ok. I'm not beholden to them, or to any politician or political party. The only people I work for are Hoosiers.

I'm going to keep fighting tooth and nail to do right by you -- voting to protect health care, to protect Social Security, and against McConnell's deficit-spiking, disastrous tax law.

But the attacks are now coming harder than ever. **The only way we can pull out a win in November is if _everyone_ on this team steps up _now_.**

**So I 'm asking: [Can you donate just a couple dollars?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c214a/7377f838/3f51a841/51f96899/4237272857/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?refcode=20180514.1nd&amount=10") It would mean so much to me, and do so much for the future of our state.**

Thank you for all you do,

Joe

You are the heart of this campaign.

Tomorrow is one of our last fundraising deadlines before June's primary.
These deadlines feel like they're always creeping up on you, and it can be hard to know why they're important at all -- but they make all the difference in what we can do, and what we can't.

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Demand Congress protect Mueller
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | **1OO,OOO Signatures Needed to PROTECT Robert Mueller
[ _ADD YOUR NAME >>_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fcb/622b7b5b/1ab333c5/307b8598/2269609129/VEsH/ "https://sign.actiontaker.org/mueller-dws")** I think President Trump is nervous. Robert Mueller is the special counsel appointed to investigate the Trump campaign and administration's ties to Russia. Mueller's work must not be impeded. He's indicted several senior members of Trump's campaign. And we're not talking about volunteers who work in the mailroom -- **we're talking about Trump's former campaign manager.** Robert Mueller is doing his job thoroughly. Too thoroughly, it seems, for President Trump's comfort. He wants to fire Mueller -- presumably, before Mueller has the chance to complete his investigation. Now you know me. I'm not shy when it comes to calling out Trump and his allies in Congress on their missteps and failures. And a presidential candidate colluding with a foreign power trying to hack our elections is the height of misconduct. Mueller must be allowed to finish his work. Congress can protect Mueller by passing a law. But Trump-allied Republicans in Congress are blocking that action. [**_It's time for us to turn up the grassroots heat. We 're trying to collect 100,000 signatures demanding Congress protect Robert Mueller and his investigation. Will you be one of the 100,000? Add your name >>_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fcb/622b7b5b/1ab333c5/307b8598/2269609129/VEsE/ "https://sign.actiontaker.org/mueller-dws") We deserve to know what ties exist between our President and the foreign power that tried to hack our elections. Thanks for standing with me on this. Debbie
---
